about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm a Full Stack Developer with experience building web applications, backend services, and internal tools. My work includes developing data processing and visualization platforms, automating information workflows, modernizing legacy systems, and setting up CI/CD pipelines for reliable cloud deployments.
